_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the empty-source (branch 3) of the excel-activities/write-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException 'Ignore empty source is ineffective' from WriteRangeX) → jobs logs (Filter DataTable on Status='Overdue' produced 0 rows from 247 input rows + WriteRange config shows ExcludeHeaders=False) → workflow source. The 0-row DataTable + ExcludeHeaders=False combination is the smoking gun; the 'Ignore empty source' option does not handle this case (only the Nothing case).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0066666-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
